name: Jiaxin (Jerry) Qian
title: Senior Backend Engineer
summary: Senior Backend Engineer with 8+ years of experience building high-throughput, cloud-native microservices in Java. Deep expertise in Spring Boot and event-driven architectures (Kafka / RabbitMQ), with hands-on AWS production experience and working familiarity with Google Cloud Platform services. Proven track record designing scalable, testable backend systems in fast-moving financial environments — including regulatory data platforms processing millions of transactions daily. Thrives in collaborative, high-ownership cultures; experienced mentoring engineers and partnering directly with product and engineering leadership to ship impactful features reliably.

experience.title: Senior Backend Engineer (Contract)
bullets: Designed and delivered cloud-hosted Java Spring Boot microservices supporting high-volume regulatory data workflows — processing millions of financial transactions daily with strict consistency and reliability requirements.

Architected idempotent, retry-safe REST APIs and distributed transaction flows on AWS (EC2, RDS, S3), directly mirroring the resilient, scalable backend patterns required for a high-growth fintech rewards platform.
Drove CI/CD pipeline improvements (Jenkins / Git) and Infrastructure-as-Code practices, reducing deployment cycle time and strengthening release reliability across multiple service environments.
Integrated Kafka event-driven messaging to decouple processing pipelines, improving throughput and fault tolerance — applicable to real-time points accrual and rewards processing at scale.
Reduced API latency by 30% through Oracle query optimization and backend service refactoring, directly improving end-user responsiveness.
Built comprehensive automated test suites (JUnit — integration and performance), maintaining high code quality and confidence in a compliance-critical environment.
Mentored junior and mid-level engineers through code reviews, pairing sessions, and architecture walkthroughs; collaborated closely with product owners and engineering leadership on roadmap delivery.
Implemented structured observability (Splunk / Prometheus) for proactive production monitoring, alerting, and incident response.

experience.title: Backend Engineer
bullets: Built Java Spring Boot microservices and REST APIs supporting operational business workflows and internal applications, with a focus on reliability and test coverage.
Automated release pipelines and designed backend integrations for secure, cross-system data exchange — reducing manual release effort by ~60% and improving deployment consistency.
Mentored engineers on CI/CD best practices and automated tooling; contributed to Agile ceremonies that increased sprint velocity and cross-team transparency.

experience.title: Java Software Engineer
bullets: Developed high-throughput backend APIs for transactional reservation processing using Java and asynchronous messaging patterns (RabbitMQ) — experience directly transferable to rewards points and payments processing.
Designed distributed validation logic ensuring transactional consistency and data integrity across backend services under high concurrency.

experience.title: Java Backend Developer
bullets: Built enterprise Java / Spring MVC backend services for regulated policy management platforms, gaining early experience with compliance-driven data integrity requirements.
Grew automated test coverage from 15% to 75% (JUnit), significantly reducing production defects and improving long-term maintainability.
Performed backend performance tuning across legacy services, improving throughput for high-frequency data workloads.

education.school: Queens College, City University of New York
education.degree: Bachelor of Science in Computer Science
